title: Lucid Q2 2024 Earnings Report
text: Lucid delivered 2,394 vehicles in Q2 2024, representing a 70.5% increase compared to the same period last year. The company produced 2,110 vehicles during the quarter and projected approximately 9,000 vehicles for the full year. Q2 revenue reached $200.6 million. The company concluded the quarter with roughly $4.28 billion in total liquidity. CEO Peter Rawlinson stated he was very encouraged by the company's sales and market share momentum and the benefits realized from cost optimization programs. An affiliate of Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund committed an additional $1.5 billion in funding. Lucid achieved a landmark efficiency rating of 5.0 miles per kilowatt hour, exceeding internal projections. The company continued advancing Lucid Gravity SUV launch preparations. The newly committed capital was expected to sustain operations through at least Q4 2025, supporting execution of the company's long-term strategy.
